TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: South sudan u South sudan sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 8 00 N, 30 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 644,329 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 12,530,717. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Juba. . nuyu aydaay a suodu Juba caay henay kakapah ku nipatideng, atu tukay tadaamelik tu mucelak, utiih ku cenhu mikuwan, sisa, sifu itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan tusa a bulad midateng tu kawaw, mikiyaku tu duma a niyadu' patideng tu nikiyakuan tu baluhay a dukay, mala baluhay a sudu. . tukay nikiyakuan amahida u Nigeria nu Apu-cia ,Burma a Napu-du ,atu Brazil nu Brasilia (Pa-si-li-ya Ś∑īŤ•ŅŚą©šļě). sifu musakamuay sakamu sa itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan pitu a bulad sakamusa, sifu midaduy henay tu Lansi-e mala baluhay a suodu sa. . Lansi-e itida i Hupuo banaw a katidaan, micapi tu cun ce'daw kitidaan, wali a ce'daw kitidaan atu Cun-la kitidaan a sababenisan, itada i kitidaan sa micapi tu kanatal nu teban. sakamusa, Aehan.cia-lan namapatay sakamusa mangalay milimad tu sudu patayda i Lansi-e . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 9 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Salva Kiir Mayardit, micakat a demiad sa i 2011 a mihca 7 bulad 9 demiad. kanatalay a bulawan kitakit yadah a kanatal nu niyaduan mangalay miduduc misiteked, tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (2017) a mahcaan cinlaw ku Spain ciataylunni-ya a Kosovo , itida i kanatalan mangalay mikilim tu katuuday patideng atu palutatengaay, mangalay patidenga tu pisiteked a kanatal, manglay idaw ku cacaya a demiad taneng micumud tu likec nu kanatal . Śú®ťĚěśī≤, . itini i Africa , idaw ku cacayay milihida tupi singkiw atu misalihalay misiteked a kanatal: South Sudan . South Sudan itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan pitu a bulat siwa a demiad misiteked. i lima a demiad mala lanhekuo a tademaw. South Sudan a wunmin, caayay kahida unipisitekedan a kakapah, macunuaca tunika caay kahedek nuni kalepacaw. (Salva Kiir Mayardit)Śú®9śúą12 . South Sudan cung-tun ci (Salva Kiir Mayardit, ť¶¨šļěÁąĺŤŅ™ÁČĻ) itin i siwaw a bulat cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa a demiad atu mihantaya nu hitay masasulit tu kiyaku, mangalay mihedek tu kawaw i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) a mahcaan katukuh tu aydaay ani kalepacawan. nina South Sudan nikalepacawan, makaala tu lima a mang kumapataya nu tademaw, nina kanatal sakatusa a tabkiya nu (Malakal ť¶¨śčČŚć°Áąĺ) naw tatelungan nu macimacian, ni kalepacawan satu mahidatu u di'di'tuwan ku kakitidaan, numi laliway a tademaw matalaw a taluma'. ťėŅŤŅ™ÁĪ≥śĖĮ(Josephine Adiemis) . Josephine Adiemis cacaya a lalumaan walu a tademawan itini i Malakal i tepaltu nu lanhekuo a kitidaan, anu taluma' i nalumaan, ayaan hakiya cumudan nu caayay katinenga numita a tademaw. " . " ayda hantu inai ku lihalay hananay a sasakamuen. anu caaytu ka cinlaw ku katalumaan, alaw ahiyan numidebungay tuluma' niyam mipatay." ci Josephine Adiemis mahini sa. Malakal a kalpacawan itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (2015) a mihcaan, u tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu a (2013) mihcaan ni kalepacawan i labu. nikalepacawan tu i labu u Cungtun ci Salva Kiir Mayardit atu nu ayawan nu fu Cungtun ci Riek Machar nuni kacaayan kasasungaay, sisa malepacaw satu. hatiniay tu a nakamuan, kya pankiw nu South Sudan a tademaw malaliyas namin, numiidaay tu simal nu sakaudip a South Sudan adada satu kunabalucuan. itini i Malakal kitidaan Niluo-cuo mi kawaw tu lanhekuo sakakapah a kiyaku ci Hazel de Wet sakamusa, u Malakal kaw linzi sananay a patidengan, kumisuayaw tunika lihalay tuna balucuan. nika, aydaay a tademaw mangaly miliyas tu dabek manglay tuluma', amisuayaw tu utiih."tademaw tayni itini mangalay miyukiw tunipisebeng, sisa mangalay taluma, idaw kumidiputay idadan taneng maka tukuh i luma sa"ci Wi-te' . pabaway a Niluo-cuo a talakaway a tapan ci Peter Aban Amon sakamusa, manamuh kunuheni katalumaan i Mala-kal a luma'; " Malakal kitidaan a sifu kapah tu kunipikuwan, kapah kuni pikawawan ayda sa." sakamu sa ci A-mun , naayaw nu tusaay a mihcaan mucelak tu ku tademaw saan. sakamusa ku niyadu'ay a cenhu, hatidaay a tadengan palutatengan tu lenhekuo a likec nu kanatal. cinlawsa kui dabekaya a tademaw, tatelungan nu iciba inai ku taydaay, nika alaan i sawac tu buting patayda han i kasidabekan, caay kaw sipatayda i tukay. Malakal a sifuwan nu hetay atu mibebeliahay a hitay nikalepacawan a kakitidaan, nukina pinaan anikasasuadaan mamin tu malekep maluyuh malawpes ku kitidaan. nuyaduay a tademaw Simon Pakuang , tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (2017) a mihcaan mikilim tu luma' nu udipsa, manamuh makaadih caay ka hicahica, nika ilabu hantu idawtu ku muenengay tiya lumaan u mialaway a tademaw palita hanuheni ku Simon Pakuang , mangalay a taluma' haw han, caay kanglay talumaan nu Simon Pakuang a tademaw, miyukiw aca kunuheni sakapah han ku luma' misilud hannida, katukuh tuni ka kapah nu nikaudipan han kya manglay kami a malimad taluma sa.
S.PHON: soutńß sudan u soutńß sudan sa i r~…ĺabu nu afri ¶a, itiza i * ** n, ** ** …ô. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa izaw ku ***,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômawan sa **,***,***. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u *uba. . nuju ajdaaj a suodu *uba ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kakapańß ku nipatid…ôŇč, atu tukaj tadaam…ôr~…ĺik tu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak, utiińß ku ¶…ônńßu mikuwan, sisa, sifu itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan tusa a bur~…ĺad midat…ôŇč tu kawaw, mikijaku tu duma a nijadu Ē~ ° patid…ôŇč tu nikijakuan tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a dukaj, mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺuńßaj a sudu. . tukaj nikijakuan amańßida u nig…ôria nu apu- ¶ia ,burma a napu-du ,atu brazir~…ĺ nu brasir~…ĺia (pa-si-r~…ĺi-ja ****). sifu musakamuaj sakamu sa itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad sakamusa, sifu midaduj ńß…ônaj tu r~…ĺansi-…ô mar~…ĺa bar~…ĺuńßaj a suodu sa. . r~…ĺansi-…ô itida i ńßupuo banaw a katidaan, mi ¶api tu ¶un ¶…ô Ē~ °daw kitidaan, war~…ĺi a ¶…ô Ē~ °daw kitidaan atu ¶un-r~…ĺa kitidaan a sabab…ônisan, itada i kitidaan sa mi ¶api tu kanatar~…ĺ nu t…ôban. sakamusa, a…ôńßan. ¶ia-r~…ĺan namapataj sakamusa maŇčar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺimad tu sudu patajda i r~…ĺansi-…ô . kakiŇčinan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiŇčiŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad sa * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) ajza sa ¶i sar~…ĺ*a kiir majardit, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. kanatar~…ĺaj a bur~…ĺawan kitakit jadańß a kanatar~…ĺ nu nijaduan maŇčar~…ĺaj midudu ¶ misit…ôk…ôd, tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu (****) a mańß ¶aan ¶inr~…ĺaw ku spain ¶iatajr~…ĺunni-ja a koso*o , itida i kanatar~…ĺan maŇčar~…ĺaj mikir~…ĺim tu katuudaj patid…ôŇč atu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaaj, maŇčar~…ĺaj patid…ôŇča tu pisit…ôk…ôd a kanatar~…ĺ, maŇčr~…ĺaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a d…ômiad tan…ôŇč mi ¶umud tu r~…ĺik…ô ¶ nu kanatar~…ĺ . ***, . itini i afri ¶a , idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj mir~…ĺińßida tupi siŇčkiw atu misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj misit…ôk…ôd a kanatar~…ĺ: soutńß sudan . soutńß sudan itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺat siwa a d…ômiad misit…ôk…ôd. i r~…ĺima a d…ômiad mar~…ĺa r~…ĺanńß…ôkuo a tad…ômaw. soutńß sudan a wunmin, ¶aajaj kańßida unipisit…ôk…ôdan a kakapańß, ma ¶unua ¶a tunika ¶aaj kańß…ôd…ôk nuni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. (sar~…ĺ*a kiir majardit)***** . soutńß sudan ¶uŇč-tun ¶i (sar~…ĺ*a kiir majardit, *****) itin i siwaw a bur~…ĺat ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tusa a d…ômiad atu mińßantaja nu ńßitaj masasur~…ĺit tu kijaku, maŇčar~…ĺaj mińß…ôd…ôk tu kawaw i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mańß ¶aan katukuńß tu ajdaaj ani kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. nina soutńß sudan nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a maŇč kumapataja nu tad…ômaw, nina kanatar~…ĺ sakatusa a tabkija nu (mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ ****) naw tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian, ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan satu mańßidatu u di Ē~ °di Ē~ °tuwan ku kakitidaan, numi r~…ĺar~…ĺiwaj a tad…ômaw matar~…ĺaw a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ****(*os…ôpńßin…ô adi…ômis) . *os…ôpńßin…ô adi…ômis ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan war~…ĺu a tad…ômawan itini i mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ i t…ôpar~…ĺtu nu r~…ĺanńß…ôkuo a kitidaan, anu tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i nar~…ĺumaan, ajaan ńßakija ¶umudan nu ¶aajaj katin…ôŇča numita a tad…ômaw. " . " ajda ńßantu inai ku r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßananaj a sasakamu…ôn. anu ¶aajtu ka ¶inr~…ĺaw ku katar~…ĺumaan, ar~…ĺaw ańßijan numid…ôbuŇčaj tur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nijam mipataj." ¶i *os…ôpńßin…ô adi…ômis mańßini sa. mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ a kar~…ĺpa ¶awan itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß ¶aan, u tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a (****) mińß ¶aan ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan i r~…ĺabu. nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu i r~…ĺabu u ¶uŇčtun ¶i sar~…ĺ*a kiir majardit atu nu ajawan nu fu ¶uŇčtun ¶i *i…ôk ma ¶ńßar nuni ka ¶aajan kasasuŇčaaj, sisa mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw satu. ńßatiniaj tu a nakamuan, kja pankiw nu soutńß sudan a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas namin, numiidaaj tu simar~…ĺ nu sakaudip a soutńß sudan adada satu kunabar~…ĺu ¶uan. itini i mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ kitidaan nir~…ĺuo- ¶uo mi kawaw tu r~…ĺanńß…ôkuo sakakapańß a kijaku ¶i ńßaz…ôr~…ĺ d…ô w…ôt sakamusa, u mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ kaw r~…ĺinzi sananaj a patid…ôŇčan, kumisuajaw tunika r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tuna bar~…ĺu ¶uan. nika, ajdaaj a tad…ômaw maŇčar~…ĺj mir~…ĺijas tu dab…ôk maŇčr~…ĺaj tur~…ĺuma Ē~ °, amisuajaw tu utiińß."tad…ômaw tajni itini maŇčar~…ĺaj mijukiw tunipis…ôb…ôŇč, sisa maŇčar~…ĺaj tar~…ĺuma, idaw kumidiputaj idadan tan…ôŇč maka tukuńß i r~…ĺuma sa" ¶i wi-t…ô Ē~ ° . pabawaj a nir~…ĺuo- ¶uo a tar~…ĺakawaj a tapan ¶i p…ôt…ôr aban amon sakamusa, manamuńß kunuńß…ôni katar~…ĺumaan i mar~…ĺa-kar~…ĺ a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °; " mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ kitidaan a sifu kapańß tu kunipikuwan, kapańß kuni pikawawan ajda sa." sakamu sa ¶i a-mun , naajaw nu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak tu ku tad…ômaw saan. sakamusa ku nijadu Ē~ °aj a ¶…ônńßu, ńßatidaaj a tad…ôŇčan par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu r~…ĺ…ônńß…ôkuo a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ nu kanatar~…ĺ. ¶inr~…ĺawsa kui dab…ôkaja a tad…ômaw, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu i ¶iba inai ku tajdaaj, nika ar~…ĺaan i sawa ¶ tu butiŇč patajda ńßan i kasidab…ôkan, ¶aaj kaw sipatajda i tukaj. mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ a sifuwan nu ńß…ôtaj atu mib…ôb…ôr~…ĺiańßaj a ńßitaj nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a kakitidaan, nukina pinaan anikasasuadaan mamin tu mar~…ĺ…ôk…ôp mar~…ĺujuńß mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku kitidaan. nujaduaj a tad…ômaw simon pakuaŇč , tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu (****) a mińß ¶aan mikir~…ĺim tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu udipsa, manamuńß makaadińß ¶aaj ka ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a, nika ir~…ĺabu ńßantu idawtu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj tija r~…ĺumaan u miar~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺita ńßanuńß…ôni ku simon pakuaŇč , maŇčar~…ĺaj a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßaw ńßan, ¶aaj kaŇčr~…ĺaj tar~…ĺumaan nu simon pakuaŇč a tad…ômaw, mijukiw a ¶a kunuńß…ôni sakapańß ńßan ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° misir~…ĺud ńßannida, katukuńß tuni ka kapańß nu nikaudipan ńßan kja maŇčr~…ĺaj kami a mar~…ĺimad tar~…ĺuma sa.
S.FORM: South sudan u South sudan sa i labu nu Africa, itiza i 8 00 N, 30 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 644,329 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 12,530,717. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Juba. . nuyu aydaay a suodu Juba caay henay kakapah ku nipatideng, atu tukay tadaamelik tu mucelak, utiih ku cenhu mikuwan, sisa, sifu itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan tusa a bulad midateng tu kawaw, mikiyaku tu duma a niyadu' patideng tu nikiyakuan tu baluhay a dukay, mala baluhay a sudu. . tukay nikiyakuan amahida u Nigeria nu Apu-cia ,Burma a Napu-du ,atu Brazil nu Brasilia (Pa-si-li-ya Ś∑īŤ•ŅŚą©šļě). sifu musakamuay sakamu sa itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan pitu a bulad sakamusa, sifu midaduy henay tu Lansi-e mala baluhay a suodu sa. . Lansi-e itida i Hupuo banaw a katidaan, micapi tu cun ce'daw kitidaan, wali a ce'daw kitidaan atu Cun-la kitidaan a sababenisan, itada i kitidaan sa micapi tu kanatal nu teban. sakamusa, Aehan.cia-lan namapatay sakamusa mangalay milimad tu sudu patayda i Lansi-e . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 9 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Salva Kiir Mayardit, micakat a demiad sa i 2011 a mihca 7 bulad 9 demiad. kanatalay a bulawan kitakit yadah a kanatal nu niyaduan mangalay miduduc misiteked, tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (2017) a mahcaan cinlaw ku Spain ciataylunni-ya a Kosovo , itida i kanatalan mangalay mikilim tu katuuday patideng atu palutatengaay, mangalay patidenga tu pisiteked a kanatal, manglay idaw ku cacaya a demiad taneng micumud tu likec nu kanatal . Śú®ťĚěśī≤, . itini i Africa , idaw ku cacayay milihida tupi singkiw atu misalihalay misiteked a kanatal: South Sudan . South Sudan itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan pitu a bulat siwa a demiad misiteked. i lima a demiad mala lanhekuo a tademaw. South Sudan a wunmin, caayay kahida unipisitekedan a kakapah, macunuaca tunika caay kahedek nuni kalepacaw. (Salva Kiir Mayardit)Śú®9śúą12 . South Sudan cung-tun ci (Salva Kiir Mayardit, ť¶¨šļěÁąĺŤŅ™ÁČĻ) itin i siwaw a bulat cacay a bataan idaw ku tusa a demiad atu mihantaya nu hitay masasulit tu kiyaku, mangalay mihedek tu kawaw i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) a mahcaan katukuh tu aydaay ani kalepacawan. nina South Sudan nikalepacawan, makaala tu lima a mang kumapataya nu tademaw, nina kanatal sakatusa a tabkiya nu (Malakal ť¶¨śčČŚć°Áąĺ) naw tatelungan nu macimacian, ni kalepacawan satu mahidatu u di'di'tuwan ku kakitidaan, numi laliway a tademaw matalaw a taluma'. ťėŅŤŅ™ÁĪ≥śĖĮ(Josephine Adiemis) . Josephine Adiemis cacaya a lalumaan walu a tademawan itini i Malakal i tepaltu nu lanhekuo a kitidaan, anu taluma' i nalumaan, ayaan hakiya cumudan nu caayay katinenga numita a tademaw. " . " ayda hantu inai ku lihalay hananay a sasakamuen. anu caaytu ka cinlaw ku katalumaan, alaw ahiyan numidebungay tuluma' niyam mipatay." ci Josephine Adiemis mahini sa. Malakal a kalpacawan itini i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (2015) a mihcaan, u tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu a (2013) mihcaan ni kalepacawan i labu. nikalepacawan tu i labu u Cungtun ci Salva Kiir Mayardit atu nu ayawan nu fu Cungtun ci Riek Machar nuni kacaayan kasasungaay, sisa malepacaw satu. hatiniay tu a nakamuan, kya pankiw nu South Sudan a tademaw malaliyas namin, numiidaay tu simal nu sakaudip a South Sudan adada satu kunabalucuan. itini i Malakal kitidaan Niluo-cuo mi kawaw tu lanhekuo sakakapah a kiyaku ci Hazel de Wet sakamusa, u Malakal kaw linzi sananay a patidengan, kumisuayaw tunika lihalay tuna balucuan. nika, aydaay a tademaw mangaly miliyas tu dabek manglay tuluma', amisuayaw tu utiih."tademaw tayni itini mangalay miyukiw tunipisebeng, sisa mangalay taluma, idaw kumidiputay idadan taneng maka tukuh i luma sa"ci Wi-te' . pabaway a Niluo-cuo a talakaway a tapan ci Peter Aban Amon sakamusa, manamuh kunuheni katalumaan i Mala-kal a luma'; " Malakal kitidaan a sifu kapah tu kunipikuwan, kapah kuni pikawawan ayda sa." sakamu sa ci A-mun , naayaw nu tusaay a mihcaan mucelak tu ku tademaw saan. sakamusa ku niyadu'ay a cenhu, hatidaay a tadengan palutatengan tu lenhekuo a likec nu kanatal. cinlawsa kui dabekaya a tademaw, tatelungan nu iciba inai ku taydaay, nika alaan i sawac tu buting patayda han i kasidabekan, caay kaw sipatayda i tukay. Malakal a sifuwan nu hetay atu mibebeliahay a hitay nikalepacawan a kakitidaan, nukina pinaan anikasasuadaan mamin tu malekep maluyuh malawpes ku kitidaan. nuyaduay a tademaw Simon Pakuang , tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (2017) a mihcaan mikilim tu luma' nu udipsa, manamuh makaadih caay ka hicahica, nika ilabu hantu idawtu ku muenengay tiya lumaan u mialaway a tademaw palita hanuheni ku Simon Pakuang , mangalay a taluma' haw han, caay kanglay talumaan nu Simon Pakuang a tademaw, miyukiw aca kunuheni sakapah han ku luma' misilud hannida, katukuh tuni ka kapah nu nikaudipan han kya manglay kami a malimad taluma sa.

tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u *uba. . nuju ajdaaj a suodu *uba ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kakapańß ku nipatid…ôŇč, atu tukaj tadaam…ôr~…ĺik tu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak, utiińß ku ¶…ônńßu mikuwan, sisa, itini i afri ¶a , idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj mir~…ĺińßida tupi siŇčkiw atu misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj misit…ôk…ôd a kanatar~…ĺ: soutńß sudan . soutńß sudan itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (sar~…ĺ*a kiir majardit)***** . soutńß sudan ¶uŇč-tun ¶i (sar~…ĺ*a kiir majardit, *****) itin i siwaw a bur~…ĺat ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tusa a d…ômiad atu mińßantaja nu ńßitaj masasur~…ĺit tu kijaku, maŇčar~…ĺaj mińß…ôd…ôk tu kawaw i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mańß ¶aan katukuńß tu ajdaaj ani kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. nina soutńß sudan nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a maŇč kumapataja nu tad…ômaw, nina kanatar~…ĺ sakatusa a tabkija nu (mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ ****) naw tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian, ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan satu mańßidatu u di Ē~ °di Ē~ °tuwan ku kakitidaan, numi r~…ĺar~…ĺiwaj a tad…ômaw matar~…ĺaw a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ****(*os…ôpńßin…ô adi…ômis) . *os…ôpńßin…ô adi…ômis ¶a ¶aja a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan war~…ĺu a tad…ômawan itini i mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ i t…ôpar~…ĺtu nu r~…ĺanńß…ôkuo a kitidaan, anu tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i nar~…ĺumaan, ajaan ńßakija ¶umudan nu ¶aajaj katin…ôŇča numita a tad…ômaw. " . " ajda ńßantu inai ku r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßananaj a sasakamu…ôn. anu ¶aajtu ka ¶inr~…ĺaw ku katar~…ĺumaan, ar~…ĺaw ańßijan numid…ôbuŇčaj tur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nijam mipataj." ¶i *os…ôpńßin…ô adi…ômis mańßini sa. mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ a kar~…ĺpa ¶awan itini i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß ¶aan, u tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a (****) mińß ¶aan ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan i r~…ĺabu. nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu i r~…ĺabu u ¶uŇčtun ¶i sar~…ĺ*a kiir majardit atu nu ajawan nu fu ¶uŇčtun ¶i *i…ôk ma ¶ńßar nuni ka ¶aajan kasasuŇčaaj, sisa mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw satu. ńßatiniaj tu a nakamuan, kja pankiw nu soutńß sudan a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas namin, numiidaaj tu simar~…ĺ nu sakaudip a soutńß sudan adada satu kunabar~…ĺu ¶uan. itini i mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ kitidaan nir~…ĺuo- ¶uo mi kawaw tu r~…ĺanńß…ôkuo sakakapańß a kijaku ¶i ńßaz…ôr~…ĺ d…ô w…ôt sakamusa, u mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ kaw r~…ĺinzi sananaj a patid…ôŇčan, kumisuajaw tunika r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tuna bar~…ĺu ¶uan. nika, ajdaaj a tad…ômaw maŇčar~…ĺj mir~…ĺijas tu dab…ôk maŇčr~…ĺaj tur~…ĺuma Ē~ °, amisuajaw tu utiińß."tad…ômaw tajni itini maŇčar~…ĺaj mijukiw tunipis…ôb…ôŇč, sisa maŇčar~…ĺaj tar~…ĺuma, idaw kumidiputaj idadan tan…ôŇč maka tukuńß i r~…ĺuma sa" ¶i wi-t…ô Ē~ ° . pabawaj a nir~…ĺuo- ¶uo a tar~…ĺakawaj a tapan ¶i p…ôt…ôr aban amon sakamusa, manamuńß kunuńß…ôni katar~…ĺumaan i mar~…ĺa-kar~…ĺ a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °; " mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ kitidaan a sifu kapańß tu kunipikuwan, kapańß kuni pikawawan ajda sa." sakamu sa ¶i a-mun , naajaw nu tusaaj a mińß ¶aan mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak tu ku tad…ômaw saan. sakamusa ku nijadu Ē~ °aj a ¶…ônńßu, ńßatidaaj a tad…ôŇčan par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu r~…ĺ…ônńß…ôkuo a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ nu kanatar~…ĺ. ¶inr~…ĺawsa kui dab…ôkaja a tad…ômaw, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu i ¶iba inai ku tajdaaj, nika ar~…ĺaan i sawa ¶ tu butiŇč patajda ńßan i kasidab…ôkan, ¶aaj kaw sipatajda i tukaj. mar~…ĺakar~…ĺ a sifuwan nu ńß…ôtaj atu mib…ôb…ôr~…ĺiańßaj a ńßitaj nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan a kakitidaan, nukina pinaan anikasasuadaan mamin tu mar~…ĺ…ôk…ôp mar~…ĺujuńß mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku kitidaan. nujaduaj a tad…ômaw simon pakuaŇč , tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu (****) a mińß ¶aan mikir~…ĺim tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu udipsa, manamuńß makaadińß ¶aaj ka ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a, nika ir~…ĺabu ńßantu idawtu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj tija r~…ĺumaan u miar~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺita ńßanuńß…ôni ku simon pakuaŇč , maŇčar~…ĺaj a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßaw ńßan, ¶aaj kaŇčr~…ĺaj tar~…ĺumaan nu simon pakuaŇč a tad…ômaw, mijukiw a ¶a kunuńß…ôni sakapańß ńßan ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° misir~…ĺud ńßannida, katukuńß tuni ka kapańß nu nikaudipan ńßan kja maŇčr~…ĺaj kami a mar~…ĺimad tar~…ĺuma sa.
